infos.Description: Standard procedure for cleaning and standardising a dataset, to be performed prior to data analysis.

NaN values.Description: Handle missing values in the dataset.
NaN values.Question: Write Python code to handle missing values in a dataset.

Duplicates.Description: Identify and remove duplicate rows from the dataset.
Duplicates.Question: Generate Python code to identify and remove duplicate rows in a dataset.

Standardisation.Description: Standardize the features by scaling them to have a mean of 0 and a standard deviation of 1.
Standardisation.Question: Create Python code to standardize features by scaling them to have a mean of 0 and a standard deviation of 1.

Unrelevant columns.Description: Remove columns that are not relevant for the analysis or model training.
Unrelevant columns.Question: Generate Python code to remove irrelevant columns from a dataset.

Rename columns.Description: Rename columns to make them more descriptive or consistent.
Rename columns.Question: Write Python code to rename columns in a dataset to make them more descriptive or consistent.

Remove outliers.Description: Identify and remove outliers from the dataset.
Remove outliers.Question: Create Python code to identify and remove outliers from a dataset.
